name: Graham Cracker Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites to a froth (not stiff, just foamy).
2. Add the brown rice syrup and continue to beat until well mixed.
3. Stir in the crushed graham crackers.
4. Drop onto a non-stick baking surface, making about 16-20 mounds.
5. Bake at 400°F for 10-12 minutes.
Graham Cracker Cookies recipe yields approximately 1/4 gram of fat per cookie (5 grams per graham cracker used), with each cookie containing around 15 calories not accounting for the rice syrup or egg whites.
